search.input_help: Candidates will be displayed when you enter one or more characters

results.title: Search Results
results.placeholder: Enter search conditions and press the search button
results.map_aria_label: Show route from {{departure}} to {{arrival}} on map
results.calendar_aria_label: Add bus from {{departure}} to {{arrival}} to calendar

api.overview_desc: Saga Bus Navigator provides REST API endpoints that can be used by external applications. You can programmatically access bus stop information, timetables, and route search functionality.
api.authentication_desc: Currently, no authentication is required to use the API. All endpoints are freely accessible.
api.response_format_desc: All responses are returned in JSON format.
api.cors_desc: All endpoints support CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing), allowing access from different domains.
api.endpoint_stops_search_desc: Search by bus stop name and get next departure times
api.endpoint_routes_search_desc: Search routes by specifying departure and arrival stops
api.endpoint_first_last_desc: Get first and last bus information for a specified stop
api.stops_search_desc: Search by bus stop name and get next departure times and route information.
api.routes_search_desc: Search routes by specifying departure and arrival stops, and get timetable information.
api.first_last_desc: Get first and last bus information for a specified stop.
api.routes_search_param_time: Search time (HH:MM format, default: current time)
api.routes_search_param_type: Search type (departure-time | arrival-time | now | first-bus | last-bus, default: now)
api.routes_search_param_weekday: Day type (weekday | weekend | auto, default: auto)
api.first_last_param_to: Destination stop name (if specified, only first/last buses to that destination)
api.first_last_param_weekday: Day type (weekday | weekend | auto, default: auto)
api.error_404_title: 404 Not Found - Bus Stop Not Found
api.error_404_no_bus: 404 Not Found - No First/Last Bus Found
api.error_404_stop_not_found: 404 Not Found - Bus Stop Does Not Exist

modal.calendar_description: Please select how to add to calendar
modal.usage_text_search_desc: When you enter a bus stop name, candidates will be displayed. If you enter one or more characters, candidates will be automatically narrowed down.
modal.usage_map_search_desc: Clicking the "Select from Map" button allows you to select a bus stop on the map. Please click on a marker on the map to choose a bus stop.
modal.usage_departure_time_desc: Search for buses departing after the specified time. Please enter a time and press the search button.
modal.usage_arrival_time_desc: Search for buses arriving by the specified time. Please enter a time and press the search button.
modal.usage_now_desc: Search for the bus closest to the current time. This is convenient when you want to find a bus you can board immediately.
modal.usage_first_bus_desc: Search for the first bus of the day. This is useful for early morning travel plans.
modal.usage_last_bus_desc: Search for the last bus of the day. This is useful for late-night travel plans.
modal.usage_route_info_desc: Search results display the route name, destination, departure time, and arrival time. If multiple routes are found, they will be displayed in chronological order.
modal.usage_fare_desc: The fare for each route is displayed. The fare shown is for adults.
modal.usage_duration_desc: The travel time from the departure stop to the arrival stop is displayed.
modal.usage_timetable_detail_desc: Clicking on each item in the search results will display a detailed timetable for that route. In the timetable, you can check all bus stops and passing times.
modal.usage_calendar_desc: Clicking the "Add to Calendar" button from the timetable detail screen allows you to register the bus departure time in your calendar app. You can choose to download in iCal format or register directly with Google Calendar.
modal.requirements_browsers_desc: This service has been tested on the following browsers.
modal.requirements_mobile_desc: On mobile devices, we have confirmed operation on Android Chrome and iOS Chrome. Some features may not work properly on other browsers or older versions.
modal.requirements_safari_desc1: On Safari (iOS and macOS), location services and map display may not work properly. If you are using Safari, please use another browser such as Chrome.
modal.requirements_safari_desc2: When accessing from iPhone Safari, a warning dialog about map display instability will be shown on first access. This warning can be dismissed by selecting "Do not show this warning again," and it will not appear on subsequent visits.
modal.terms_service_scope_desc: This service provides route bus information within Saga Prefecture. The information provided is based on open data published by Saga Prefecture. Information may be changed without notice.
modal.terms_data_accuracy_desc: The information provided by this service is based on open data, but we do not guarantee its accuracy, completeness, or usefulness. Actual bus operations may change due to weather, traffic conditions, and other factors. For important travel, please also check the official information from each bus operator.
modal.terms_open_data_desc: This service uses open data provided by Saga Prefecture. The terms of use for open data follow the terms of use of the data provider.
modal.terms_location_desc: This service obtains location information from your device when using the current location feature. The location information obtained is used only for displaying the current location on the map and searching for nearby bus stops, and is never sent to or stored on a server. Use of location information is limited to processing within the browser.
modal.terms_privacy_desc: This service does not obtain or store personally identifiable information. Information submitted through the contact form is used only for responding to inquiries and is never provided to third parties.
modal.terms_service_changes_desc: This service may change its content, temporarily interrupt, or terminate without notice. We cannot be held responsible for any damages arising from these actions.
modal.terms_disclaimer_desc: We are not responsible for any damages arising from the use of this service. This service is provided "as is" and does not guarantee suitability for any particular purpose.
modal.ack_data_provider_desc: This application uses open data provided by Saga Prefecture. We deeply thank Saga Prefecture and related operators for publishing accurate and up-to-date bus information.
modal.ack_saga_bus_desc: Provides bus information within Saga Prefecture.
modal.ack_open_data_desc: Publishes bus data in GTFS format.
modal.ack_gtfs_desc: GTFS (General Transit Feed Specification) is a standard format for describing public transit schedules and geographic information. This application uses GTFS format data to provide real-time, accurate bus information.
modal.ack_map_libraries_desc: This application uses the following open source libraries and services for map display functionality.
modal.ack_leaflet_desc: A JavaScript library for creating mobile-friendly interactive maps.
modal.ack_openstreetmap_desc: A project that provides open source map data. This application uses OpenStreetMap map tiles.

timetable.title: Timetable
timetable.no_routes_found: No routes found at this stop
timetable.detection_rate_calc_failed: Failed to calculate direction detection rate

error.select_stops: Please select departure and arrival stops
error.invalid_stop_name: Invalid bus stop name. Please select from the candidate list.
error.same_stops: Please select different stops for departure and arrival
error.invalid_departure: Invalid departure stop. Please select from the candidate list.
error.invalid_arrival: Invalid arrival stop. Please select from the candidate list.
error.time_format: Please enter a valid time (Hour: 0-23, Minute: 0-59)
error.search_error: An error occurred during search. Please try again.
error.bus_stop_mapping_failed: Failed to load bus stop mapping
error.ors_unavailable: Failed to fetch route (showing straight line as fallback)
error.ors_rate_limited: Route requests are rate-limited. Please try again later (showing straight line as fallback)
error.ors_invalid_coordinates: Invalid coordinates. Unable to fetch route (showing straight line as fallback)

form.help_departure: Candidates will be displayed when you enter one or more characters
form.help_arrival: Candidates will be displayed when you enter one or more characters

mcp.overview_desc: Saga Bus Navigator provides a Model Context Protocol (MCP) compatible server. AI assistants like Claude Desktop can directly access Saga City bus information.
mcp.what_is_mcp_desc: Model Context Protocol (MCP) is a protocol that allows AI assistants to access external data sources and tools in a standardized way. Using MCP, AI assistants can search and retrieve Saga City bus information in natural language.
mcp.feature_bus_stop_search_desc: Search by bus stop name and get next departure times
mcp.feature_route_search_desc: Search for direct buses by specifying start and end points
mcp.feature_first_last_desc: Get first and last bus information for a specified stop
mcp.docker_hub_desc: The MCP server is published on Docker Hub.
mcp.installation_desc: Instructions for using the MCP server with Claude Desktop.
mcp.step1_desc: Pull the latest image from Docker Hub.
mcp.step2_desc: Edit the Claude Desktop configuration file.
mcp.step3_desc: Restart Claude Desktop to apply the configuration.
mcp.step4_desc: Test the setup by asking questions like:
mcp.example_query1: "What's the next bus at Saga Station Bus Center?"
mcp.example_query2: "Tell me buses from Saga Station to Saga University"
mcp.example_query3: "What time are the first and last buses at Saga Station Bus Center?"
mcp.tools_desc: Description of the three tools provided by the MCP server.
mcp.tool_search_bus_stops_desc: Search by bus stop name and get next departure times and route information.
mcp.tool_search_routes_desc: Search for direct buses by specifying start and end points.
mcp.tool_get_first_last_bus_desc: Get first and last bus information for a specified stop.
mcp.tool_search_bus_stops_example: "What's the next bus at Saga Station Bus Center?"
mcp.tool_search_routes_example: "Tell me buses from Saga Station to Saga University"
mcp.tool_get_first_last_bus_example: "What time are the first and last buses at Saga Station Bus Center?"
mcp.github_desc: The MCP server source code is available on GitHub.
